params.name: Throne of St. Peter
params.description:
On Jun 1, 1647 AD, Bernini was once again commissioned by the Pope to begin designing the Throne of St. Peter.
The Throne of St. Peter, situated at the rear of St. Peter's Basilica, is a grand ensemble of bronze sculptures created by Bernini. Adorned with exquisite gemstones, it features a radiant celestial niche and an intricately decorated wooden chair. Two small angels positioned at the chair's back hold the keys to heaven and the pope's triple crown. This resplendent throne serves as the …
